title: (Bearish Signal) BE, Aroon Indicator entered a Downtrend on March 15, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
For the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that BE's AroonDown red line is above 70 while the AroonUp green line is below 30 for three straight days. This move could indicate a strong downtrend ahead for BE, and traders may view it as a Sell signal for the next month. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 100 similar cases, 89 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 89%. Current price $28.56 crossed the resistance line at $27.79 and is trading between $30.32 resistance and $27.79 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/10/21 - 03/15/21, the price experienced a -28% Downtrend, while the week of 03/08/21 - 03/15/21 shows a +18% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/irx2j3d9jfn61.png?width=1537&format=png&auto=webp&s=bde2a6d9fa80bdd342828450cd1d54ebfa655d8d

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator has been in the overbought zone for 1 day. Expect a price pull-back in the near future.

The Momentum Indicator moved below the 0 level on March 15, 2021. You may want to consider selling the stock, shorting the stock, or exploring put options on BE as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 30 of 34 cases where the Momentum Indicator fell below 0, the stock fell further within the subsequent month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 88%.

BE moved below its 50-day Moving Average on February 17, 2021 date and that indicates a change from an upward trend to a downward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for BE crossed bearishly below the 50-day moving average on February 25, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted lower and could be considered a sell signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 6 of 7 past instances when the 10-day crossed below the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 86%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where BE declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 82%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9938417-bloom-energy-corp-ordinary-shares-s-be-29-78-aroon-indicator-entered-a-downtrend-on-march-15-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
